SEARCH
Package gov.cdc.izgateway.ads

Class RestfulFileSender

java.lang.Object
gov.cdc.izgateway.ads.RestfulFileSender
All Implemented Interfaces:
FileSender
Direct Known Subclasses:
AzureBlobStorageSender, DEXStorageSender
@Component public abstract class RestfulFileSender extends Object implements FileSender
This class implements the FileSender interface to Azure and the Azurite Azure emulator.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    protected static class 
    RestfulFileSender.HttpException
    This class is used to throw an HttpException in derived classes where the errorStream comes from a new UrlConnection.
    static class 
    RestfulFileSender.SenderConfig

  • Method Details

    • getConnection

      protected abstract HttpURLConnection getConnection(String string, gov.cdc.izgateway.model.IDestination route, Metadata meta, jakarta.activation.DataHandler object) throws IOException, MetadataFault, gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.fault.DestinationConnectionFault, URISyntaxException, gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.fault.SecurityFault
      Connect the socket to the phiz_trust_ws_client trust store for endpoint certificate validation. and set up of other parameters (e.g., encryption, TLS version, et cetera).
      Parameters:
      string -
      route - The URL to Connect
      meta -
      object -
      Returns:
      The connection
      Throws:
      IOException - If any errors occur setting up the connection
      MetadataFault - If there are issues in the metadata configuration.
      gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.fault.DestinationConnectionFault
      gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.fault.SecurityFault
      URISyntaxException

    • writeData

      protected abstract int writeData(HttpURLConnection con, gov.cdc.izgateway.model.IDestination route, jakarta.activation.DataHandler data, Metadata meta) throws IOException, MetadataFault, gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.fault.DestinationConnectionFault, io.tus.java.client.ProtocolException
      Copy data stored in DataHandler to the URLConnection.
      Returns:
      Throws:
      MetadataFault
      ProtocolException
      gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.fault.DestinationConnectionFault
      IOException
      io.tus.java.client.ProtocolException

    • checkException

      public static void checkException(gov.cdc.izgateway.model.IDestination routing, String path, long elapsedTimeIIS, Throwable rootCause, InputStream error) throws gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.fault.HubClientFault, gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.fault.DestinationConnectionFault, gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.fault.SecurityFault
      Reusable portion of ValidateResponse refactored out for reuse by ADS Service.
      Parameters:
      routing - The destination to counnect to
      path - The path being accessed
      elapsedTimeIIS - Time spent thus far
      rootCause - The exception
      error - The error message
      Throws:
      gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.fault.HubClientFault - If there was a fault on the hub side
      gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.fault.DestinationConnectionFault - If there was a fault on the client side
      gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.fault.SecurityFault - If there was a security fault
